name: Ludo Online
author: Poki
description: Ludo Online is the classic board game you love, now with online multiplayer fun! Challenge your friends or players from around the world in exciting matches, or enjoy local and 2-player modes for casual fun. Customize your board with unique themes, earn achievements, and climb the leaderboards to prove your skill. Simple to learn but endlessly fun, Ludo Online brings strategy, luck, and laughter together in every match. Roll the dice and start your Ludo adventure now! How to play Ludo Online? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Ludo Online? Ludo Online is created by InfinityGames.io. Play their other games on Poki: Checkers Multiplayer , Tic Tac Toe , Energy , Infinity Loop: Hex , Merge Shapes , Shapes , Solitaire , Spider Solitaire , Sudoblocks , Laser Quest , Wood Blocks 3D , Classic Chess , Chess Multiplayer , and Maze: Path of Light ! How can I play Ludo Online for free? You can play Ludo Online for free on Poki. Can I play Ludo Online on mobile devices and desktop? Ludo Online can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Ludo Online with my friend? Yes! Ludo Online is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend online!
